_notes: Caps are YOURS to set; defaults are conservative placeholders. kelly_fraction 0.25 = quarter-Kelly. Awards need a bigger edge because the Boot model is cruder (opposition-unadjusted shares). Golden Ball/Glove are never bet: no calibrated model exists for them. exact_score ships OFF: the grid backtests calibrated, but per-cell edges are the model's thinnest claims — opt in deliberately.
